infographic.description: 带文字标注的结构化信息图

mindmap.description: 中心辐射的概念关系图

concept.description: 抽象概念的可视化解释

flat_vector.prompt_zh: 扁平矢量插画风格（flat vector illustration）。造型几何化、简洁圆润，统一粗细的清晰轮廓线勾边；大面积明亮纯色块平涂填充，绝无渐变、投影或立体厚度。表面哑光纯色、无高光无纹理。光照均匀无方向性，不产生写实阴影。色彩明快现代、克制留白，图标与图形高度符号化。这是矢量插画而非照片或 3D 渲染，避免任何写实细节与摄影质感。最适合：科普、教程、产品讲解类的清晰图解。
flat_vector.prompt_en: Flat vector illustration style. Geometric, clean, rounded shapes with uniform-weight crisp outlines; large areas of bright solid color, absolutely no gradients, drop shadows, or 3D thickness. Matte solid surfaces, no highlights or texture. Even, directionless lighting with no realistic shadows. Bright, modern colors, restrained white space, highly symbolic icons. This is vector art, not a photo or 3D render — avoid any photorealistic detail. Best for: explainer, tutorial, and product-walkthrough diagrams.
flat_vector.mood_zh: 整体观感：干净、亲和、现代。

isometric_3d.prompt_zh: 等距 2.5D 风格（isometric illustration）。物体以等角投影、约 30° 等距视角呈现，有轻微立体厚度但不写实；几何化的方块、卡片与图标整齐排布，边缘干净利落。表面为现代科技感的纯色，配柔和的方向性阴影增强层次，无强反光、无照片纹理。色彩明快、对比清晰。这是等距矢量图解而非真实 3D 渲染或照片。最适合：流程、系统结构、产品功能的立体化展示。
isometric_3d.prompt_en: Isometric 2.5D illustration style. Objects in axonometric projection at a ~30° isometric angle with slight depth but not realistic; geometric blocks, cards, and icons arranged neatly with clean edges. Modern-tech solid-color surfaces with soft directional shadows for depth, no strong reflections or photo texture. Bright colors, clear contrast. This is isometric vector art, not a true 3D render or photo. Best for: processes, system structures, and product-feature showcases.
isometric_3d.mood_zh: 整体观感：现代、科技、有秩序的立体感。
isometric_3d.mood_en: Overall mood: modern, tech-forward, orderly depth.

hand_drawn.prompt_zh: 手绘插画风格（hand-drawn illustration）。线条为略不规整、有机的手绘笔触，带轻微抖动与呼吸感，温暖亲切；造型随性但清晰可辨。填色为柔和自然的色块，可带淡淡纸张或马克笔质感，无锐利矢量边缘、无渐变光泽。光照柔和均匀，不产生写实阴影。整体亲和、有人情味。这是手绘图解而非照片或精确矢量图。最适合：故事性、叙事类、轻松科普内容。
hand_drawn.prompt_en: Hand-drawn illustration style. Slightly irregular, organic hand-drawn strokes with subtle wobble and breathing room, warm and friendly; loose but clearly legible shapes. Soft, natural color fills with a faint paper or marker texture, no sharp vector edges or glossy gradients. Soft, even lighting with no realistic shadows. Warm and human overall. This is a hand-drawn diagram, not a photo or precise vector art. Best for: storytelling, narrative, and light explainer content.
hand_drawn.mood_zh: 整体观感：温暖、亲切、有人情味。

infographic_modern.prompt_zh: 现代信息图风格（modern infographic）。以数据可视化为核心：图标化表达、清晰的卡片/分区、明确的视觉层级与对齐网格，专业商务感。造型简洁规整，可含简化的图表元素（条形、占比、箭头），线条利落。表面纯色平涂，配少量细微分隔或投影增强分区，无写实纹理。色彩克制专业、强调色突出关键数据。这是信息图解而非照片或装饰插画。最适合：会议、评测、新闻、数据要点。
infographic_modern.prompt_en: Modern infographic style. Data-visualization first: iconographic expression, clear cards/sections, explicit visual hierarchy on an alignment grid, professional and business-like. Clean, regular shapes that may include simplified chart elements (bars, ratios, arrows), crisp lines. Flat solid fills with subtle dividers or shadows to define sections, no photorealistic texture. Restrained professional colors with the accent highlighting key data. This is an infographic, not a photo or decorative illustration. Best for: meetings, reviews, news, and data takeaways.
infographic_modern.mood_zh: 整体观感：专业、商务、数据清晰。

chalkboard.prompt_zh: 黑板手写风格（chalkboard sketch）。深墨绿或近黑色板面背景，白色与少量彩色粉笔质感的线条与文字，边缘略带粉笔颗粒与轻微擦痕。造型为随手板书式的简笔图标、箭头与方框，线条略不规整、有手绘呼吸感。光照柔和均匀，无写实反光。整体营造课堂教学、学术讲解的氛围。文字应像粉笔书写但保持清晰可读。这是板书图解而非照片，避免任何光泽、渐变与三维质感。最适合：讲座、知识科普、概念讲解。
chalkboard.prompt_en: Chalkboard sketch style. Dark teal or near-black board background, white with a few colored chalk-textured lines and text, edges with slight chalk grain and faint smudges. Casual board-writing-style simple icons, arrows, and boxes; slightly irregular lines with a hand-drawn feel. Soft, even lighting with no realistic glare. Creates a classroom/academic atmosphere. Text should look chalk-written but stay clearly legible. This is a board diagram, not a photo — avoid any gloss, gradient, or 3D feel. Best for: lectures, explainers, and concept walkthroughs.
chalkboard.mood_zh: 整体观感：课堂教学、学术、手写质感。

zh.hierarchical:
采用层级结构布局：
- 顶部居中放置主标题（大字醒目）
- 中部为核心内容区，从上到下按重要性排列
- 使用缩进或连接线表示从属关系
- 每个层级使用不同颜色或图标区分
- 主要分支3-5个，每个分支可有2-3个子项
zh.radial:
采用放射状/思维导图布局：
- 中心放置核心主题（圆形或椭圆形节点）
- 3-5个关键观点围绕中心均匀分布
- 使用连接线展示概念关联
- 可使用气泡或卡片形式呈现各观点
- 每个观点用不同颜色区分
zh.horizontal_flow:
采用水平流程布局：
- 从左到右的时间或逻辑顺序
- 使用箭头或连接线表示流向
- 每个节点包含图标和简短文字（4-6字）
- 突出关键节点或转折点（用不同颜色或大小）
- 节点之间保持均匀间距
zh.step_by_step:
采用步骤式布局：
- 清晰的数字编号（①②③ 或 1、2、3）
- 每步包含图标和简短说明（一句话）
- 步骤之间用箭头或虚线连接
- 可使用不同颜色区分步骤状态
- 纵向或横向排列均可，保持视觉流畅
zh.split_comparison:
采用分屏对比布局：
- 左右对称分布，中间有分隔线
- 相同维度对齐便于比较
- 左侧用一种颜色，右侧用另一种颜色
- 顶部标明对比对象名称
- 中间或底部可放置对比维度标签
zh.conversation:
采用对话式布局：
- 使用气泡或卡片呈现不同观点
- 可用不同颜色或位置区分发言者
- 突出金句或重要引用（加引号、放大）
- 整体呈现对话流程感
- 可加入小头像或图标代表发言者
zh.narrative_flow:
采用叙事流程布局：
- 按时间线或故事线从左到右或从上到下组织
- 关键事件节点用较大的卡片突出显示
- 可包含人物或场景小图标
- 使用连接线保持叙事的连贯性
- 时间标记清晰可见
zh.highlights:
采用亮点突出布局：
- 核心亮点居中或顶部，用大字体和醒目颜色
- 3-4个支撑信息环绕分布
- 使用大小和颜色区分重要性
- 整体视觉聚焦明确
- 可用图标辅助表达各亮点
zh.timeline_flow:
采用时间轴布局：
- 水平或垂直时间线贯穿全图
- 时间节点均匀分布在时间线上
- 每个节点包含时间和事件描述
- 可用不同颜色区分事件类型或重要程度
- 重要节点可放大或加粗显示
zh.flexible:
采用灵活自适应布局：
- 根据内容量自动调整布局结构
- 保持视觉平衡和美观
- 突出最重要的信息（放大、居中、醒目色）
- 留有适当的呼吸空间
- 信息分组清晰，易于快速浏览

en.hierarchical:
Use hierarchical structure layout:
- Main title centered at top (large, prominent)
- Core content area in middle, arranged top-to-bottom by importance
- Use indentation or connecting lines to show relationships
- Different colors or icons for each level
- 3-5 main branches, each with 2-3 sub-items
en.radial:
Use radial/mind map layout:
- Central core theme (circular or oval node)
- 3-5 key points distributed evenly around center
- Connecting lines showing concept relationships
- Use bubbles or cards for each point
- Different colors to distinguish each point
en.horizontal_flow:
Use horizontal flow layout:
- Left-to-right time or logical sequence
- Arrows or connecting lines to show direction
- Each node contains icon and short text (4-6 words)
- Highlight key nodes or turning points (different color or size)
- Maintain even spacing between nodes
en.step_by_step:
Use step-by-step layout:
- Clear numbered sequence
- Each step includes icon and brief description (one sentence)
- Steps connected by arrows or dashed lines
- Different colors to distinguish step status
- Can be vertical or horizontal, maintain visual flow
en.split_comparison:
Use split comparison layout:
- Left-right symmetrical distribution with dividing line
- Same dimensions aligned for easy comparison
- One color scheme for left side, another for right
- Object names labeled at top
- Comparison dimension labels in middle or bottom
en.conversation:
Use conversation-style layout:
- Speech bubbles or cards for different viewpoints
- Different colors or positions to distinguish speakers
- Highlight key quotes (quotation marks, enlarged)
- Show conversation flow overall
- Can add small avatars or icons for speakers
en.narrative_flow:
Use narrative flow layout:
- Organize left-to-right or top-to-bottom along timeline/storyline
- Key events highlighted with larger cards
- Can include character or scene icons
- Connecting lines maintain narrative continuity
- Time markers clearly visible
en.highlights:
Use highlights-focused layout:
- Core highlight centered or at top, large font and prominent color
- 3-4 supporting points distributed around
- Use size and color to distinguish importance
- Clear overall visual focus
- Icons can help express each highlight
en.timeline_flow:
Use timeline layout:
- Horizontal or vertical timeline running through the image
- Time nodes evenly distributed on timeline
- Each node contains time and event description
- Different colors for event types or importance levels
- Important nodes can be enlarged or bolded
en.flexible:
Use flexible adaptive layout:
- Automatically adjust structure based on content amount
- Maintain visual balance and aesthetics
- Highlight most important information (enlarged, centered, prominent color)
- Leave appropriate breathing space
- Clear information grouping for quick scanning
